title: Brickify
description: React.js based tool that accepts HTML, CSS, and JS, then converts it into Bricks Builder JSON.
impact: Saves development time when building Bricks Builder websites from existing front-end structure.
imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Brickify developer tool

title: PinAuto
description: Pinterest automation website built around clear product positioning, WordPress structure, and integration-focused pages.
impact: Clearer product story and easier path toward signup or inquiry.
imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the PinAuto website

title: Clampy
description: A small utility for generating responsive CSS clamp() values without manual viewport math.
impact: Makes responsive spacing and typography tokens faster to create and easier to repeat.
imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Clampy web app

title: Markedine
description: WordPress and Elementor service site with clearer sections, conversion paths, and WhatsApp contact flow.
impact: Improved service clarity and easier lead contact path.
imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Markedine website

title: Xgrid B2B
description: Custom WordPress B2B marketing site using PHP templates, ACF content architecture, and REST API patterns.
impact: Custom CMS foundation for scalable marketing pages.
imageAlt: Screenshot preview of the Xgrid B2B marketing website
